goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'north american' food.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 12:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve north american food
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on wednesday and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID and travel time
